rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §61.0511, which governs the My Texas Future college admissions and financial aid portal. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The board shall create, maintain, and administer an electronic platform and submission portal, known as My Texas Future (MyTexasFuture.Org), to facilitate the awareness and application of students into institutions of higher education.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns higher education admissions portal, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
